version="29.6.6"> <diagram id="cfFQRTz-9gTWuPwSChIR" name="pageWithNumber"> <mxGraphModel dx="-494" dy="-154" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="827" pageHeight="1169" math="0" shadow="0" adaptiveColors="auto"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=20;fontStyle=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=none;strokeColor=none;fontColor=#333333;" value="AdvChat &mdash; System Architecture" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="500" x="250" y="10" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="col1_label" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;align=center;fillColor=none;strokeColor=none;fontColor=#4A90D9;" value="User-Facing" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="200" x="40" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="col2_label" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;align=center;fillColor=none;strokeColor=none;fontColor=#5CB85C;" value="Backend" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="200" x="370" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="col3_label" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;align=center;fillColor=none;strokeColor=none;fontColor=#F0AD4E;" value="External Services" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="200" x="700" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="user" parent="1" style="shape=mxgraph.basic.smiley;html=1;rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#4A90D9;fontColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#3A7BC8;fontSize=12;arcSize=20;" value="<b>User</b><br>Browser" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="110" x="85" y="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="frontend" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#4A90D9;fontColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#3A7BC8;fontSize=12;arcSize=20;" value="<b>Next.js 15</b><br>Frontend<br><font style="font-size:10px">(Vercel)</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="140" x="70" y="270" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="backend" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#5CB85C;fontColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#4CAE4C;fontSize=12;arcSize=20;" value="<b>Express API</b><br>TypeScript<br><font style="font-size:10px">(Railway)</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="140" x="400" y="200" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="clerk" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#5CB85C;fontColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#4CAE4C;fontSize=12;arcSize=20;" value="<b>Clerk</b><br>Auth (OAuth)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="140" x="400" y="340" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="openai" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#F0AD4E;fontColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#EC971F;fontSize=12;arcSize=20;" value="<b>OpenAI</b><br>LLM + Embeddings<br><font style="font-size:10px">GPT-4o-mini + text-embedding-3-small</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="200" x="700" y="100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pinecone" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#F0AD4E;fontColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#EC971F;fontSize=12;arcSize=20;" value="<b>Pinecone</b><br>Vector DB<br><font style="font-size:10px">Namespace per user</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="200" x="700" y="200" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="postgres" parent="1" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#F0AD4E;fontColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#EC971F;fontSize=12;size=12;" value="<b>PostgreSQL</b><br>Data<br><font style="font-size:10px">Users, Conversations, Documents</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="75" width="200" x="700" y="300" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="redis" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#F0AD4E;fontColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#EC971F;fontSize=12;arcSize=20;" value="<b>Redis</b><br>Cache<br><font style="font-size:10px">emb: + resp: keys</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="65" width="200" x="700" y="405" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_user_fe" edge="1" parent="1" source="user" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;strokeColor=#999999;fontColor=#666666;fontSize=10;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="frontend" value="HTTPS"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_fe_be" edge="1" parent="1" source="frontend" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;strokeColor=#999999;fontColor=#666666;fontSize=10;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="backend" value="REST + SSE"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_fe_clerk" edge="1" parent="1" source="frontend" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;strokeColor=#999999;fontColor=#666666;fontSize=10;exitX=1;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="clerk" value="Auth (OAuth)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_be_clerk" edge="1" parent="1" source="clerk" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;strokeColor=#999999;fontColor=#666666;fontSize=10;dashed=1;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="backend" value="Webhook<br>(user sync)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="570" y="370" /> <mxPoint x="570" y="290" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_be_openai" edge="1" parent="1" source="backend" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;strokeColor=#999999;fontColor=#666666;fontSize=10;exitX=1;exitY=0.25;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="openai" value="Embeddings +<br>Chat Completions"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_be_pinecone" edge="1" parent="1" source="backend" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;strokeColor=#999999;fontColor=#666666;fontSize=10;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="pinecone" value="Upsert +<br>Similarity Search"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_be_postgres" edge="1" parent="1" source="backend" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;strokeColor=#999999;fontColor=#666666;fontSize=10;exitX=1;exitY=0.75;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="postgres" value="Prisma ORM"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_be_redis" edge="1" parent="1" source="backend" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;strokeColor=#999999;fontColor=#666666;fontSize=10;exitX=0.75;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="redis" value="Cache<br>(emb: + resp:)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="annotation" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=11;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#F5F5F5;strokeColor=#CCCCCC;rounded=1;arcSize=10;fontColor=#555555;" value="<b>Upload:</b> PDF &rarr; Chunk width="650" x="170" y="500" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
